themes.exampleQuote: Contender for best noodle soup in Pittsburgh.
Can never go wrong with the soup dumplings.
Wonderful service, delicious food, kind and welcoming staff.
Fun to watch them make noodles, potstickers, and wontons.
Server deliberately overcharged card for tip after receiving cash tip on top of demanding more tip on Chinese New Year.
Server kept bringing out food that was not ordered.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the handmade noodles, soups, and dumplings — calling the noodle soup a Pittsburgh best — but a standout negative review flags a serious incident of a server overcharging and demanding extra tips.
notable_quote: Contender for best noodle soup in Pittsburgh.
